notes: Patterns ported from the original Cashiro CredParser.kt (parser-core/src/main/kotlin/com/ritesh/parser/core/bank/CredParser.kt). CRED is a credit card bill-payment app; its confirmations represent transfers from the user's bank account to a credit card account, so the original parser hardcodes TransactionType.TRANSFER. The Kotlin isTransactionMessage requires BOTH "payment of" AND "credited towards your". The manifest filter (requireAnyKeyword) only supports any-of, so the filter gates on the more specific "credited towards your" phrase, and a pipeline rejectWhen step (notContainsAny: "payment of") downgrades any message missing "payment of" — approximating the Kotlin dual-gate. Filter-level FILTER_REJECTED stays REJECTED; the pipeline guard yields REVIEW + PIPELINE_REJECTED (the engine has no pipeline path to hard-REJECTED), which still prevents a silent clean-TRANSFER false positive for promo/statement SMS that lack "payment of".

fixtures.name: CRED payment to ICICI credit card
fixtures.body: Payment of Rs.50000 has been successfully credited towards your ICICI Bank Credit Card. Your payment was settled in 3 seconds - CRED

fixtures.name: CRED payment with decimal amount
fixtures.body: Payment of Rs.1234.56 has been successfully credited towards your HDFC Credit Card. Your payment was settled in 3 seconds - CRED

fixtures.name: CRED payment with comma-formatted amount
fixtures.body: Payment of Rs.50,000 has been successfully credited towards your ICICI Bank Credit Card. Your payment was settled in 3 seconds - CRED

fixtures.name: CRED sender CRED-S pattern
fixtures.body: Payment of Rs.10000 has been successfully credited towards your SBI Credit Card.

fixtures.name: CRED sender CRED-T pattern
fixtures.body: Payment of Rs.5000 has been successfully credited towards your HDFC Credit Card.

fixtures.name: OTP message is filter-rejected
fixtures.body: Your OTP for transaction is 123456. Do not share.

fixtures.name: failed CRED payment is filter-rejected
fixtures.body: Payment of Rs.50000 could not be processed. Please try again later.

fixtures.name: promo/reminder with 'credited towards your' but no 'payment of' is pipeline-rejected
fixtures.body: Reward points worth Rs.500 will be credited towards your ICICI Bank Credit Card when you pay your bill on CRED.
